## What

## Why

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation / templates / mappings
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests scripts` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests scripts` passes
- [ ] `mypy src` passes (strict)
- [ ] `pytest --cov=healthcare_ai_governance --cov-fail-under=80` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README, PRACTITIONERS, docs/)
- [ ] No real PHI; the change does not overstate capabilities or imply compliance
- [ ] Framework citations (if touched) verified against primary sources
